description: The value labels across the bars are wildly inconsistent: some bars show abbreviated values like "0.9K" or "0.613K," others show two decimal places (e.g., "906.00," "651.00"), one uses a single decimal ("715.1"), and two bars (Kiribati and South Africa) have no label at all. Font sizes also vary dramatically — from size 6 to size 16 — and one label is bolded while others are not, making the chart look haphazard and difficult to read consistently.
